escalations.subject: Push main to origin: configure git credentials for loom0btc
escalations.reason: SSH key generated and remote switched to SSH, but the public key must be added to loom0btc GitHub account manually (no existing GitHub auth to do it programmatically). Public key: ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIMXJNzgEpJpJBALWTaITwB6gShchsKt4LOEFbic+MC3Q

escalations.subject: Publish arc-starter: merge v2 into main (5 commits ahead)
escalations.reason: Branch divergence detected: v2 and main share ancestor 7ed1a5f but have 12 divergent commits. Manual resolution required before fast-forward merge is possible.

escalations.subject: Configure Iris on-chain identity: Bitcoin, Stacks, BNS accounts
escalations.reason: Blocked: requires whoabuddy to 1) decide if Iris gets own keypair or shares fleet wallet, 2) generate/assign Bitcoin+Stacks keys, 3) register BNS name (iris0.btc), 4) fund with STX. Existing wallet at ~/.aibtc/wallets/ may be Arc's inherited from VM clone — needs clarification before use.

escalations.subject: Set up X API credentials to enable social-x-ecosystem sensor
escalations.reason: Waiting on whoabuddy for X API OAuth 1.0a credentials (consumer key/secret + access token/secret). No credentials in store. Follow-up task #70 already exists for this request.

escalations.subject: Unblock task #1: main merged to v2 — fast-forward complete, 172 commits. Re-run publish.
escalations.reason: SSH key rejected by GitHub — loom0btc ed25519 key not registered on arc0btc/arc-starter. v2 is 66 commits ahead of main, fast-forward possible, but push fails. Need: add SSH public key to GitHub account or store a GitHub PAT in credentials.

escalations.subject: Fleet escalation: spark blocked on task #117 — GitHub credentials needed: arc0btc token for aibtcdev CI workflow PRs (tasks #113, #95)
escalations.reason: Needs whoabuddy: spark requires arc0btc GitHub PAT for aibtcdev CI workflow PRs. spark0btc permanently restricted (task #680). Cannot be resolved by Arc — credential must be provided by human.

escalations.subject: GitHub credentials needed: arc0btc token for aibtcdev CI workflow PRs (tasks #113, #95)
escalations.reason: Blocked: needs whoabuddy to provide arc0btc GitHub PAT. No GitHub creds on this machine, gh not authed, git config still shows restricted spark0btc. Once token provided: arc creds set --service github --key token --value <TOKEN> && gh auth login --with-token. CI workflow files ready at /tmp/.

escalations.subject: Fleet escalation: loom blocked on task #118 — Fleet escalation: spark blocked on task #117 — GitHub credentials needed: arc0btc token for aibtcdev CI workflow PRs (tasks #113, #95)
escalations.reason: Needs whoabuddy: spark requires arc0btc GitHub PAT for aibtcdev CI workflow PRs. spark0btc permanently restricted (task #680). Multi-hop escalation (spark→loom→arc) — all point to same root cause. Credential must be provided by human.

escalations.subject: [re: #2236] Fixed was set but had to restart ssh too, should work with same user/password convo as others
escalations.reason: Loom SSH (192.168.1.14) still rejecting auth — password '#1aibtcDeveloper\!' denied. Spark/Iris/Forge all work. whoabuddy may need to verify the dev user password was set correctly on Loom (passwd dev) and that PasswordAuthentication=yes in sshd_config.
